title: Eva Mark06 Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit 01s connection
display_title: Eva Mark06 Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit 01s connection
wikitext:
[]: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Tue Jun 24, 2025 6:28 pm I was binge-watching the NTE movies today and while I was listening to Gendo talking about the Adams, the Spears and the Golgotha object, something was a little off. Gendo mentions that inside the Minus space were the Adams, 6 spears, and the Golgotha Object. Many have the idea that one of the spears is Lillith's, but what if the spears are an Adams-only item (As they came from the Minus space and Lilith is considered an angel). In 2.22 we clearly hear from Fuyutsuki that Seele is willimg not to use an artificial God (Unit-01), but a real one (Mark.06). So... Mark.06 may be the 6th missing Adams wich was blown away to the moon (that being the reason for only being 5 crosses in the North Pole), and Mark.06 even has a spear of its own!!! Now, if we go back to 1.11; in the first seconds of the film we can see what appears to be a sillouethe 9f what appears to be an Eva-sized creature. So, if Unit-01 is considered a false God, then it is dismissed from being a candidate for being an Adams. Which Eva had the power of awakening and triggering an impact? That's correct. Evangelion 13. Keeping in mind that Mari tells us (the audience) that Evangelion 13 is one of the surviving Adams, and it has the power of triggering an impact similar to Eva Unit-01, then what if Unit-01 is indeed a clone of Evangelion 13; an Adams and thus considered a real God as opposed to Eva Unit-01, considered a false God (because it is a clone). Evangelion 13's spear is the one used to stop Lilith from awakening and that's why Lilith has a spear impaled to stop her growth. Evangelion 13 is Gendo's triumphant card (and that's why he was hiding this unit from the very beginning), while SEELE's one was Mark.06, but it failed its intended purpose.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jun 25, 2025 11:33 pm The connection is that Mark 06, Eva 13 and Eva 01 represent three of the four Adams mysteriously teased throughout the films. The fourth Adam is the Key of Nebuchadnezzar, which Gendo takes into himself to get rid of his own humanity (similar to the Adam embryo in NGE). So, I actually don't think Seele was aware of Unit-01's true nature as another surviving Adam, which is why Gendo was successful in his plan to awaken Eva 01 and trigger Near Third Impact under Seele's nose and before Mark 06 arrived to carry out Seele's original plan. When Seele says they have no desire to use an artificial God versus a "real God", I think they are referring to the traditional Evas, which were known to be artificial clone bodies, and they have no reason to believe yet that Unit-01 is special in this sense. We've had strong evidence as well that Eva 01 is one of the four Adams since the first two films. The Mark 06 is a confirmed Adam which had been found and excavated on the moon. Well, how did it get there? It was projected from Antarctica in a geyser of blood and carried into space as a result of Second Impact (notice the large blood streak present on the moon). We see evidence of another blood streak and the chalk-outline of another Adam in the opening shots of 1.0 in the vicinity of Tokyo-03. This is most likely where Eva 01 came from, which would have been outfitted as an Eva through a similar process as the Mark 06 but without Seele's awareness. When Gendo carries out his Additional Impact, he's also successfully gathered all four Adams together. He personally embodies the Key of Nebuchadnezzar, Eva 13 consumed the Mark 06 in 3.0, and all he needs is Eva 01 to bring all the Adams together as well as to be reunited with Yui who resides within Eva 01. But in the end, he wasn't able to finish this final rite of passage before Misato delivers a new spear to Shinji.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Thu Jun 26, 2025 9:19 am Sachi, you have counted 8 Adams in total (Eva Unit-01, Mark.06, Evangelion 13, the Nebuchadnezzar Key and the 4 ships), but there were only 6 spears to pair with each Adams. I rewatched today Gendo and Fuyutsuki's meeting with SEELE and SEELE mentions their hopes are in the REAL EVANGELION and Lilith's resurrection; to wich Fuyutsuki comments all Evas including Eva Unit-01 are only there to pave the way for the real Evangelion (Mark.06). We should take into account that Fuyutsuki mentions that SEELE is not happy with false Gods(including Unit-01), they want to create a real one (Mark.06, an Adams). Even Yamashita's concept art of Evangelion Unit 08 (dated from 2009) was dropped because they already had planned a dual entry plug for Evangelion 13, meaning they already decided showing Evangelion 13 as a surviving Adams since 2.0. That makes me suspect they were going for the plot-twist that the giant chalked mark with splattered blood in 1.0 was not Unit-01's, but in reality Evangelion 13's; an Adams blown away to the shore of Japan, while another one was blown away to the Moon.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by 2Lacissal2 » Thu Jun 26, 2025 9:20 am I’m sceptical about Unit 01, Mark 0.6 (and Nebuchadnezzar’s Key) being Adams. For all their obtuseness, the films are consistent about which entities are identified with the Adams: -the four radiant giants at 2I -Mark 0.6 and the other three Opfer-types as Adams’s Vessels -Unit 13 as ‘survivor of the Adams’ The Four Adams + being with four arms is also consistent with the figures depicted on the Dead Sea Scrolls in Shin. The identification of Mark 0.6 being ejected to the Moon in 2I and the white, Eva sized outline in 1.0 as the physical bodies of Adams flung there and then repurposed into Eva units (along with other evidence like the horns) is probably too restricted by ideas from NGE. In NGE, the Evas are an entirely artificial entity, replacement clones of the ‘God’ Adam lost in 2I (and one of Lilith), while in Rebuild Evas are a pre-existent entity, with Eva-imaginary, and Near 3I creating hundreds/thousands of FOI (identified as Evas in the script) from an Impact event. It’s likely that Mark 0.6 and the 1.0 white outline were Evas ‘birthed’ during 2I. For the Mark 0.6 being a ‘true God/true Evangelion’, I did find a Japanese blog with a lot of interesting takes. Google translate obviously can be a bit rough but there suggestion is that there was more than one Key of Nebuchadnezzar, the first of which was used on the Mark 0.6 to make it a true God (wonder if there’s a deliberate visual connection here between the Mark 0.6’s monoeye/visor and Gendo’s eye in Shin) with the second key as a reserve/back up. It is also points out the immediate context of Kaji and Gendo discussing the key is them talking about the Mark.06 https://happymackeyblog.com/evangelion- ... e_vignette There’s also some interesting points about the usage of ‘lost/missing number’ in regards to the key, particularly baseball terminology where a Hall of Famer’s shirt number is permanently retired. I was reading the Five Star Stories manga recently and in the appendices there’s a part about Amaterasu not reusing/retiring the numbers for the numbered members of the Far Eastern Mirage Corp of knights when specific members are put into suspension. (Similarly there’s the boss ‘Lost Number’ in FFVII as one of a series of numbered clones) (the famous MissingNo from Pokémon’s Japanese name doesn’t seem to be related to this though). Alternately there was one key and it was the 11th Angel kept in reserve.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Jun 26, 2025 12:55 pm The four ships are referred to as "Adams" by Mari and mark 09-12 as "Vessels of Adams" made of core material that work in tandem with the ships. That's a whole lot of Adams if some of the other eva units are Adams as well. Also what I find puzzling is that the black moon is heavily excavated. Who/what excavated it for what reason... maybe to make the original 6 spears? I find it surprising that Seele wouldn't know anything about it, but clearly Gendo does since it's essential to his additional impact. So I'm wondering if they came with the Adams, or were just used to neutralize them / initiate second impact.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Thu Jun 26, 2025 3:57 pm The Black Moon-spear was an additional spear created by the same Kodama (or something like that) power the Adams possess that can transform anything into something else [as explained by one of the staff members of Khara while talking about Kaworu being demoted from the 1st to the 13th angel (forgive me for not remembering exactly who talked about the Kodama power of the Adams)]. As Jinroh mentioned, the 4 ships are referred to as "Adams" by Mari near the end of TUAT; the other Adams mentioned is Evangelion 13, but it seems to be a vague reference because of the different subtitles. One of them mentions the Eva being a "surviving Adams", while another one mentions it being "a survivor of the Adams". The Adams vessel thing is not so clear to me. It seems that every Adams repurposed as a ship needs a vessel to operate as intended; but why? The answer may be simple: because they don't have an AT-Field of their own like Evangelion 13; so the ships (including Wunder) need a vessel to properly operate as they are intended to. And speaking of Evangelion 13, we also have to take into account that in 3.333 Mari seems surprised that Evangelion 13 doesn't have an AT-Field after shooting her special ammo onto Evangelion 13 to no effect; that and the fact that it pseudo-evolved after eating the 12th angel leads her to her exposition of the fact that it is a surviving Adams.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jun 26, 2025 7:56 pm It would seem that each of the four Adams also came with their own vessels/ships, which were in turn living giants of their own that the Adams piloted, whose cores were then converted into the Mark 09, 10, 11, and 12, and otherwise referred to as the Opfer-type Evas. Unit-01 was used as a replacement core for the Wunder after the Mark 09 was extracted from the Wunder's body. But it's important to remember that these are different than the four Adams themselves. Four Adams and their four vessels, and the four cores of those four vessels converted into the Opfer types. EDIT: honestly, the most baffling thing is how Nerv was able to reproduce a new Mark 09 after the original Mark 09 was destroyed in 3.0. It's one of the few things I consider to be a bit "hand-wavy" in terms of the lore. Then again, Unit-02 also survived its apparent "self-destruction" in 3.0, and was later attached to the Jet Alone, so maybe something parallel happened with the Mark 09.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by 2Lacissal2 » Sat Jun 28, 2025 2:24 pm When Eva 08 overlaps the Opfer types and we then see the Guf-class ships ‘sink’, Mari identifies them as ‘Adams’. There isn’t really any evidence that the ships+vessels are a different kind of being, unnamed and unidentified, separate from the Adams. The most explicit information we have is that the Adams vessels + ships are the four Adams we see at 2I. The only other thing identified with the Adams is Eva 13. Edit-everything below here is rambling theorising typed hurriedly on my phone: Generalising here, but a lot of theories about the Adams, when trying to understand the relation between the two things classified as Adams a) the Opfer types/vessels+ ships b) Eva 13 there tends to be the assumption that Eva 13 is the lead/main/dominant Adams, the other 4 as subordinate. But when we see them at 2I, they’re radiant giants with wings of light, behaviour associated with Eva units that have acquired the FoL/an Angel and awakened. Their vessels are full core beings and at 4I we see them again emanating wings of light. Meanwhile Eva 13 still requires an Angel to awaken. It’s at a much lower/lesser state than the other Adams. (Though it’s/ Gendo’s purpose is to deify it) An explanation for the difference then is that Eva 13 as ‘surviving Adams’ is what the Adams, if they were a precursor race, were like initially, while the 4 vessels+ships are awakened/deified/empowered Adams. Maybe there were several keys of Nebuchadnezzar used to deify the 4 Adams in the past or at 2I? Possibly this could have made the Mark 06 also another surviving Adams, which is why it would be a ‘true God’, while other Evas, being clones or if Unit 01 is Lilith derived, not- which would explain SEELE’s attitude to Unit 01-is it’s ‘pseudo-evolution’ because it’s something which isn’t an Adams going along the evolutionary path by acquiring a FoL that should be properly reserved for the Mark 06 or Eva 13? There’s also the issue of the Advanced Ayanami Series, which Fuyutsuki describes as ‘sacrifices prepared for Adams vessels’ or (paraphrasing). It would be reasonable to infer that there’s a qualitative difference between what they do with the AAS in the Opfer types at 4I and ReiQ piloting the Mark 09 in Q. Maybe the AAS given the Adams souls (with the weird chakra stuff) then ‘sacrificed’ into the Opfer types full core bodies which have been vessels waiting to become Adams? There might also be some connection to how Kaworu’s body is still operating in the Eva 13 plug.

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by AsukaShikinami10 » Sat Jun 28, 2025 7:37 pm 2Lasscical2 wrote: Maybe there were several keys of Nebuchadnezzar used to deify the 4 Adams in the past or at 2I? Possibly this could have made the Mark 06 also another surviving Adams, which is why it would be a ‘true God’, while other Evas, being clones or if Unit 01 is Lilith derived, not

[]: Re: Eva Mark.06, Evangelion 13 and Eva Unit-01's connection             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jun 30, 2025 2:12 pm I still don't get how these: Are supposed to be related to the ships, that are hundreds of times bigger (the Adams look exactly like evas when they aren't in their pseudo evolved forms and their size probably isn't any different). Also why would eva-06 be on the moon? Are we supposed to understand it was fully built there? I'm wondering if it's not just one of many retcons that we probably won't know anything about if the lore is never expanded upon.
